articles.title: Tehran launches more strikes after explosions reported in southern Iran
articles.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

articles.title: Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
articles.summary: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week.

articles.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
articles.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".

articles.title: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
articles.summary: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
articles.summary: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.

articles.title: Ex-Olympian pleads not guilty to Reflecting Pool vandalism charges
articles.summary: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

articles.title: Starmer gifted gun and ammunition by Turkish president at Nato
articles.summary: The weapon has not been brought back to the UK and has instead been left with British officials in Turkey.

articles.title: Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring
articles.summary: The median cost of a home in the city is now $1.7m, a record high, according to the latest figures.

articles.title: Arizona toddler found alive in morgue after being declared dead from drowning
articles.summary: After he was discovered to still be alive, the 18-month-old was flown to another hospital and survived.

articles.title: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
articles.summary: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
